## Self-review checklist
- [ ] My code only touches files in my assigned folders (see CODEOWNERS)
- [ ] I have not committed any API keys or secrets
- [ ] I have deleted my `.gitkeep` if I added the first real file to a folder
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `develop`
